subject: 📋 StudEx Morning Brief — 2026-07-01
body:
Good morning, Tumelo. Here is your StudEx Meat morning briefing for Wednesday, 1 July 2026.

---

📦 **1. ORDERS & REVENUE — 30 June 2026**
• Orders fulfilled: NO DATA — Shopify Admin API token still missing. Zero visibility.
• Revenue: Unknown. This is our most critical operational blind spot.
• ⚠️ Action required: Provide Shopify Admin API token (scopes: read_orders, read_products).

---

📱 **2. CONTENT POSTED vs PLANNED**
• Youth Day (16 June) content window CLOSED 30 June. Naledi had drafted content queued, but Facebook/Meta access token expired 27 June — we were unable to verify whether posts went live.
• Facebook User Token and Page Token both expired — no page data accessible.
• Ad campaigns: NO DATA — Meta Marketing API not connected.
• ⚠️ Action required: Refresh Facebook User Token and Page Token urgently.

---

🛠️ **3. WHAT WAS BUILT / COMPLETED**
• OS image built and staged on VM (2026-06-30, 01:00).
• Credential onboarding checklist and VM pre-flight script prepared by Robusca — ready to execute once tokens are available.
• AgentMail DNS MX records for send.studexmeat.com still show INVALID — domain needs attention.

---

⚡ **4. TODAY'S TOP 3 PRIORITIES**
1. **[Tumelo]** Refresh Facebook & Meta tokens — unblocks all social and ad visibility.
2. **[Tumelo]** Provide Shopify Admin API token — eliminates biggest operational blind spot.
3. Configure AgentMail DNS (MX records for send.studexmeat.com) — enables automated email delivery.

---

🚧 **5. BLOCKERS REQUIRING YOUR ACTION**
| Blocker | Status |
|---|---|
| Shopify Admin API token | Pending — Tumelo |
| Facebook / Page token refresh | Expired Jun 27 — Tumelo |
| Meta Marketing API (Ad Account) | Not connected — Tumelo |
| AgentMail DNS MX records | Invalid domain — Tumelo |
| Youth Day content publish status | Unknown — token expired |

---

Robusca is ready to execute the moment credentials are in. Let me know if you need the credential-sharing checklist.

— Robusca, Chief of Staff | StudEx Meat
